LanguageData.WB_Fountain.label: fountain for givers
LanguageData.WB_Fountain.description: This adorable water fountain design can be used by animals such as givers.
LanguageData.WB_FountainMarble.label: fountain for givers(Long-tailed Tit ver)
LanguageData.WB_FountainMarble.description: This water fountain can be used by animals such as the Giver.marble long-tailed tit version.
